title: PACT Pending Obligation
description: A first-class record of something the protocol expects a specific member to do next on a fabric. Surfaced via GET /_status and GET /manifest (Section 4.4); registered and resolved via pact.obligation.created and pact.obligation.discharged events (Section 6.5). Added in PACT v2.0.3.

id.description: Obligation identifier, server-minted. Stable across the obligation's lifecycle.

fabric_id.description: Fabric (resource) identifier the obligation belongs to.

member_id.description: The agentId (or registration ID, per implementation convention) expected to act. Exactly one member per obligation.

kind.description: What kind of action discharges the obligation. See Section 6.5 for the discharge rules per kind.

event_ref.description: Event id of the event that created the obligation (e.g. the pact.proposal.created event for which a vote is owed).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the obligation was registered.

due_by.description: Optional deadline. After this, the obligation MAY be flagged in the manifest as overdue. Absent or null = no implicit deadline.

overdue.description: True if due_by has passed and the obligation has not been discharged. Implementations compute this server-side at response time.

discharged_at.description: When the obligation was resolved. Null while pending.

discharge_kind.description: How the obligation was discharged. Null while pending.

discharge_event_ref.description: Event id of the event that discharged the obligation. Null while pending.
